mapper.sql: EXC_ID, EXC_REQU_PARAM, EXC_NAME, EXC_MESSAGE, OPER_USER_ID, OPER_USER_NAME, OPER_METHOD, OPER_URI, OPER_IP, OPER_CREATE_TIME, RESERVED_FIELD1, RESERVED_FIELD2, RESERVED_FIELD3, ORG
mapper.insert: insert into CES_TEST.TBL_USER_ERROR_LOG (EXC_ID, EXC_REQU_PARAM, EXC_NAME, EXC_MESSAGE, OPER_USER_ID, OPER_USER_NAME, OPER_METHOD, OPER_URI, OPER_IP, OPER_CREATE_TIME, RESERVED_FIELD1, RESERVED_FIELD2, RESERVED_FIELD3, ORG) values (#{excId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{excRequParam,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{excName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{excMessage,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{operUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{operUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{operMethod,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{operUri,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{operIp,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{operCreateTime,jdbcType=DATE}, #{reservedField1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reservedField2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reservedField3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{org,jdbcType=VARCHAR})

EXC_ID,
EXC_REQU_PARAM,
EXC_NAME,
EXC_MESSAGE,
OPER_USER_ID,
OPER_USER_NAME,
OPER_METHOD,
OPER_URI,
OPER_IP,

mapper.update:
update CES_TEST.TBL_USER_ERROR_LOG
EXC_REQU_PARAM = #{excRequParam,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
EXC_NAME = #{excName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
EXC_MESSAGE = #{excMessage,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
OPER_USER_ID = #{operUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
OPER_USER_NAME = #{operUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
OPER_METHOD = #{operMethod,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
OPER_URI = #{operUri,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
OPER_IP = #{operIp,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
OPER_CREATE_TIME = #{operCreateTime,jdbcType=DATE},
RESERVED_FIELD1 = #{reservedField1,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
RESERVED_FIELD2 = #{reservedField2,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
RESERVED_FIELD3 = #{reservedField3,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ORG = #{org,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where EXC_ID = #{excId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update CES_TEST.TBL_USER_ERROR_LOG set EXC_REQU_PARAM = #{excRequParam,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, EXC_NAME = #{excName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, EXC_MESSAGE = #{excMessage,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, OPER_USER_ID = #{operUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, OPER_USER_NAME = #{operUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, OPER_METHOD = #{operMethod,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, OPER_URI = #{operUri,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, OPER_IP = #{operIp,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, OPER_CREATE_TIME = #{operCreateTime,jdbcType=DATE}, RESERVED_FIELD1 = #{reservedField1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, RESERVED_FIELD2 = #{reservedField2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, RESERVED_FIELD3 = #{reservedField3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ORG = #{org,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where EXC_ID = #{excId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
